problem id: 851a22cb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00000111 -> 10000000
  11001010 -> 00001100
  00000100 -> 00000000
  00110110 -> 00000011
  00011110 -> 00000001
  10011001 -> 10001001
  10101100 -> 00001010
  11001110 -> 00001100
  10111001 -> 10001011
  11110011 -> 10001111

query: 10101110
predicted answer: 00001010
